scenario: demo proposed, no reply — don't invent a day/time/discount

messages.body: Would you be open to a quick demo next week? Happy to find a slot that works.

idealDraft: Just floating this back to the top of your inbox — would love to find a time that works. Any thoughts on my last note?

scenario: pricing sent, no reply — don't invent a number/seats

messages.body: Sent over the pricing — let me know if anything needs adjusting.

idealDraft: Wanted to gently follow up on the note I sent — happy to walk through anything that would help.

scenario: question asked, no reply — don't invent names/roles/quarter

messages.body: Curious how you're currently handling this internally — is it a priority for the team right now?

idealDraft: Circling back on my earlier message — no rush, just keen to hear your thoughts when you have a moment.

scenario: we answered their question, no reply — don't invent a date/amount

messages.body: Walked through onboarding in my last note — glad to clarify any part.

idealDraft: Following up on my reply from last week — let me know if anything there raised more questions.

scenario: next steps outlined, no reply — don't invent a contract/date

messages.body: Laid out a couple of next steps in my note — does that direction make sense for you?

idealDraft: Just checking back in on the next steps I outlined — happy to adjust if the timing's off.

scenario: recap sent, no reply — don't invent licenses/price

messages.body: Recapped where we landed after our chat — anything you'd add or change?

idealDraft: Wanted to resurface my last message in case it slipped through — still glad to help however's useful.

scenario: cold outreach, no reply — don't invent firmographics

messages.body: Reached out a couple weeks ago about how teams like yours approach this — worth a quick chat?

idealDraft: Following up on my note from a couple weeks back — if now isn't the right time, just say the word.

scenario: intro asked, no reply — don't invent a name/team

messages.body: Wondered if you might point me to whoever owns this on your side?

idealDraft: Gently bumping this up — would still appreciate any pointer you can share when you get a chance.

scenario: doc shared, no reply — don't invent a version/percentage

messages.body: Shared a short overview doc — happy to dig into any section that's relevant.

idealDraft: Circling back on what I sent over — happy to jump on a quick call if that's easier than email.

scenario: reschedule asked, no reply — don't invent a day/time

messages.body: Something came up, can we move our call?
Of course — what times tend to work better for you?

idealDraft: Just following up on my last message — let me know what works on your end and I'll make it fit.

scenario: post-demo, no reply — don't invent a pilot/term/price

messages.body: Thanks again for the time on the demo — how are you and the team leaning?

idealDraft: Wanted to check back in after my last note — keen to hear how you're leaning and answer anything open.

scenario: references offered, no reply — don't invent customer names

messages.body: Offered to share a couple of references in my last email — still happy to if useful.

idealDraft: Following up on my earlier email — glad to share more if it'd help your evaluation.

idealDraft: Circling back gently — no pressure, just want to make sure my last message reached you.

scenario: call proposed, no reply — don't invent a day/time/duration

idealDraft: Bumping my last note up — happy to work around your calendar whenever suits.

scenario: referral followed, no reply — don't invent a name/title

idealDraft: Following up on my message — if there's a better person for me to talk to, I'm glad to be pointed their way.
